metadata.title: Quick Angle Peek Turns Into a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT Mid
metadata.description:
This clip shows how timing and sharp aim can turn a tight mid fight in your favor. Watch the fast peek that surprised both enemies.
Where do you like to hold mid in your games?

Got a slick double kill? Share your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
